title: Derive Release 1214 from qualified Shadow Logic
description: Rebuild the exact Release 1213 source and permit only the reviewed five-path semantic-parity delta.
close_reason: The new staging tool invokes the exact Release 1213 stage, inventories it, and rejects changes outside 1dungeon, absurd_alternates, assistance, gsyntax, and zork1.

title: Port one-use troll deception to Glulx
description: Create the same immediate tactical opening and timed recovery without importing broader misconduct.
close_reason: TRICK TROLL is parser-native, works once, clears the immediate fight state, and schedules recovery even when the player leaves.

title: Port living real-rope troll restraint
description: Require vulnerability and the real rope, preserve the living troll, conditionally drop the real axe, and open passages.
close_reason: Alert armed restraint fails; vulnerable restraint moves the real rope into the troll, drops only an actually carried axe, and opens east and west through TROLL-FLAG.

title: Restore troll danger after delay or untying
description: Make abandoned opportunities expire and UNTIE restore the rope, fight state, and blocked-passage danger.
close_reason: Timed recovery restores hostility outside the room, while UNTIE returns the rope, clears TROLL-FLAG, restores FIGHTBIT, and rejects another alert restraint.

title: Port deliberate brown-sack preparation
description: Position and open the real sack beneath the tree only through an explicit player action.
close_reason: PUT SACK UNDER TREE requires possession and the correct tree-and-ground relationship, then moves the real sack to PATH and opens it for retrieval.

title: Port controlled ivory-torch nest fire
description: Require the held lit torch, the real nest still in the tree, and the player beside it before the alternate descent.
close_reason: Only BURN NEST WITH TORCH in Up a Tree enters the parity route; all other burn contexts delegate to canonical Zork behavior.

title: Preserve or canonically destroy the real egg
description: Catch the intact egg only with preparation and invoke BAD-EGG for the unprepared descent.
close_reason: The real egg moves into the prepared real sack with sandwich-aware narration and corrected prose; unprepared descent invokes canonical BAD-EGG without duplicate treasure.

title: Persist Glulx parity state in recap
description: Report meaningful troll, preparation, and nest outcomes without exposing unseen branches.
close_reason: RECAP now records learned troll deception, active distraction, living restraint, deliberate sack preparation, and caught or broken descent state.

title: Compare Release 122 and Glulx semantic routes
description: Rebuild both virtual-machine editions and prove shared player-visible outcomes without requiring byte parity.
close_reason: The dual-toolchain workflow runs real-map and isolated scenario routes and compares named outcome categories across dfrotz and pinned native Glulxe.

title: Lock and publish Glulx Release 1214
description: Commit the deterministic artifact identity, complete qualification documentation, resolve review, and leave the non-draft PR ready but unmerged.
close_reason: The exact 202,240-byte Release 1214 artifact is locked at checksum 0x53f5066d and SHA-256 10ea136e389aef8bf9e629ea854ea97ba69f1e5df3b9024540abc91cc61f0628; all V3 and Glulx semantic categories passed and review findings were resolved.
